dispositions.mechanical_boundary: NoCampaignJob uses ReadReconciliationJob normalized top-level/legacy Keys/Values state and bindings; contradictory or missing identity/state fails closed

dispositions.boundary: restoration-packet-supersession.json sets may_execute=false and binds stale packet/manifest hashes; no replacement executable packet exists

dispositions.mechanical_boundary: target and unrelated semantics now bind owner, group, interface alias/type, local/remote users, application, service, address, port, security, policy source, and rule identity
